mapper.select: SELECT R.REGION_NO AS regionNo, R.REGION_NAME AS regionName, T.TREE_LEVEL AS treeLevel, T.TREE_EXP AS treeExp, T.TOTAL_POINT_USED AS totalPointUsed FROM REGION_TBL R JOIN REGION_TREE_TBL T ON R.REGION_NO = T.REGION_NO ORDER BY R.REGION_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REGION_CONTRIBUTION_TBL (CONTRIBUTION_NO, MEMBER_ID, REGION_NO, CONTRIBUTED_POINT, CONTRIBUTED_AT) VALUES (contribution_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{regionNo}, #{point}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE REGION_TREE_TBL SET TREE_LEVEL = 1, TREE_EXP = 0, TOTAL_POINT_USED = 0
mapper.select: SELECT C.CONTRIBUTION_NO AS contributionNo, C.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, C.REGION_NO AS regionNo, R.REGION_NAME AS regionName, C.CONTRIBUTED_POINT AS contributedPoint, TO_CHAR(C.CONTRIBUTED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS contributedAt FROM REGION_CONTRIBUTION_TBL C JOIN REGION_TBL R ON C.REGION_NO = R.REGION_NO WHERE C.CONTRIBUTED_AT >= SYSDATE - (1/1440) ORDER BY C.CONTRIBUTED_AT DESC
